name: Fortnox Accounting API
what_it_does: Swedish cloud accounting platform with comprehensive REST API — managing invoices, customers, suppliers, bookkeeping entries, payroll, and financial reports for Swedish businesses, with OAuth2 and developer portal for integration partners.
use_cases: Creating and sending invoices with Swedish VAT (moms) compliance via API
Importing transactions and booking accounting entries programmatically
Managing customer and supplier registers for CRM/ERP integration
Payroll data exchange between Fortnox and HR systems via Salary API
Building Fortnox marketplace integrations via Partner API program
not_for: Non-Swedish businesses — Fortnox is built for Swedish accounting rules and regulations
Enterprise ERP with global multi-entity consolidation
Teams outside Sweden needing standard international accounting
best_when: A Swedish freelancer, SMB, or software vendor needs to integrate with Sweden's dominant accounting platform, with official API partner program access.
avoid_when: You operate outside Sweden or need international multi-currency accounting without Swedish tax focus.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Authorization Code for integrations. Client credentials for M2M in partner apps. Scoped access per resource type (invoices, customers, salary, etc.). Access tokens expire in 1 hour. Refresh token rotation. Partner program required for production OAuth2 apps.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; integrators need paid Fortnox account
pricing.paid_tiers: Fortnox subscription from 399 SEK/month; API access included with subscription
pricing.notes: Subscription-based accounting software. API access included for all subscribers. Partner API program for marketplace integrations. Swedish company (Växjö) — market leader in Swedish SMB accounting. ~400,000 Swedish businesses use Fortnox.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per subscription and partner tier

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers all accounting entities. Developer portal with detailed documentation. OAuth2 for partner integrations. Webhook support. Partner program required for production integrations — approval process. Documentation in Swedish and English.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Invoice creation creates new records. Customer creation idempotent by customer number. Bookkeeping entry creation not idempotent by default. Resource reads always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Partner program approval required for OAuth2 production apps — not instant
Access token expires in 1 hour — implement refresh token handling in agent
Swedish VAT (moms) rules required — complex for non-Swedish developers
API documentation primarily in Swedish for some endpoints — use browser translation

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — Swedish company with EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Partner program vetting. Financial data encrypted. No formal SOC2 but GDPR-compliant. Swedish regulatory compliance. Market leader with mature security practices.
